plugin_desc: Digi International 工业蜂窝/IoT 路由器专用 SNMP 采集模板（DIGI-MIB，企业号 332）。除标准 IF-MIB 64 位 HC 接口流量外，额外采集 Digi 私有 OID 的设备健康指标：CPU 使用率（直接以百分比上报）、主内存（已用 + 空闲，KB，用量按 已用/（已用+空闲）推导）与机箱温度（℃）。Digi TransPort/IX/Connect 系列为无风扇紧凑型工业设计且未以标量形式暴露电源传感器，故风扇/电源为 N/A。适用品牌型号——Digi International TransPort WR / IX / Connect EZ 工业蜂窝/IoT 路由器（企业号 332）。
name: Router

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: CPU utilisation of the Digi industrial router (DIGI-MIB, reported directly as a percentage).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_memory_used
metrics.description: Used memory of the Digi industrial router in bytes (Digi used memory, KB*1024).

metrics.name: device_memory_free
metrics.description: Free memory of the Digi industrial router in bytes (Digi free memory, KB*1024).

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilisation of the Digi industrial router, derived as used/(used+free).

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Chassis temperature of the Digi industrial router in degrees Celsius (Digi chassis temperature).
